description_long: This is a modern, three-seater armchair upholstered in a smooth, chocolate brown fabric. The seat features three distinct, plush cushions and a slightly curved backrest divided into three padded sections for ergonomic support. Two large, patterned throw pillows with a geometric black-and-white design and two smaller solid black pillows add visual interest and comfort. The armrests are wide, gently flared, and fully upholstered, providing ample support for resting arms. The base of the armchair is supported by four short, blocky wooden legs in a dark finish. The overall design is contemporary and inviting, suitable for urban living rooms, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A contemporary brown three-seater armchair with plush cushions, wide upholstered armrests, and decorative throw pillows. Supported by short, dark block legs, it features a modern, inviting design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the armchair, the thickness of the armrest, and the layered arrangement of the cushions and pillows.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the three seat cushions, three-section backrest, two patterned and two solid pillows, and the full width of the armchair.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the armrest's width, the profile of the cushions, and the arrangement of the pillows.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, padded backrest and the solid, fully upholstered back panel.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and fully upholstered in brown fabric
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, segmented, and padded with three distinct sections
attribute_leg_type: short, block-shaped wooden legs in a dark finish
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid brown fabric with patterned black-and-white throw pillows
